title: brain graduation audit — --json success output
description: Read-only bootstrap audit of the graduation copy (plan Task 5.2): inventories legacy notes by the FULL bootstrap-migration.md §7 category set (missing id/type/schema_version, ambiguous alias, duplicate identity, incompatible link, detected-credential, unsupported-schema-version) with ZERO mutation. The report categories map 1:1 to the §7 categories. detected-credential is surfaced from the graduation scan gate (encrypted-quarantine, inspectable via quarantine inspect); unsupported-schema-version is a REFUSAL category (reported for operator action but NOT quarantined / not inspectable). Requires the graduation scan gate to be clean. treeHashUnchanged asserts the vault tree hash is byte-identical before/after (the read-only guarantee).

totalNotes.description: Legacy notes inspected in the copy.

categories.description: Per-category repo-relative note-path lists. Keys map 1:1 to bootstrap-migration.md §7 quarantine categories.

detected-credential.description: Notes/files with a secret/sensitive-data finding from graduation scan (encrypted-quarantine; inspect via quarantine inspect).

unknown-type.description: Notes asserting an explicit `type` outside the managed set (unknown value or malformed non-string) — a REFUSAL (never quarantined / never inspectable): migration owns the `type` key and can neither overwrite the asserted value nor guess. Reported for operator action.

unsupported-schema-version.description: Notes asserting a schema_version above the supported max — a REFUSAL (never quarantined / never inspectable); reported for operator action.

treeHashUnchanged.description: Mandatory read-only postcondition: the copy's tree hash is byte-identical before/after the audit.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Audited read-only bootstrap audit: per-category legacy-note inventory (§7), zero vault/index/projection mutation, tree hash unchanged; emits exactly one run.readonly audit record (global Tier-0 audited-read rule).
sideEffects: emits exactly one run.readonly git-ref audit event (an executed Tier-0 audited read — global rule: reads emit an audited ledger/run.readonly record)
a post-run backup applies (this run wrote a ledger row)
prohibitedEffects: no vault/index/projection mutation (tree hash byte-identical before/after)
no more than one terminal run.readonly event per run
never runs before the graduation scan gate is clean

errorCodes.when: the graduation scan gate is blocked or absent (scan not yet clean)
the fail-closed backup watermark blocks writing the run.readonly ledger record
